generator: Blender 4.5 LTS bundled Rigify human metarig
source_rig_policy: Replace or recalibrate from an authoritative C001/source rig if one becomes available.

approval.direction_result: south faces camera; clockwise Godot screen-direction order verified
approval.ground_contact_result: boot baseline and shared footprint aligned

approval_requirements: Install a representative humanoid mesh and verify deformation.
Create and validate STK_IDLE and STK_WALK actions.
Render all eight genuine directions on the locked 1254 x 1254 canvas.
Compare framing, ground contact, scale, and silhouette against Steamtek_C001 in Godot.
Set Armature custom property steamtek_rig_status to approved only after the Godot test passes.
